name: Beiqi Foton Motor Co., Ltd.
summary: Beiqi Foton Motor Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells commercial vehicles worldwide. The company offers passenger vehicles, such as vans, pickups, and SUVs; light-duty trucks; medium and heavy-duty trucks; and buses and coaches. It also provides Total Care, parts, and financing services. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
